questions.question: The unique output of an AND gate is a __________ output only when all inputs are HIGH
Suppose that you have an unknown two-input gate that is either an OR gate or an AND gate. What combination of input levels should you apply to the gate's inputs to determine which type of gate it is?
No matter how many inputs it has, an AND input gate will produce a HIGH output for only one combination of input levels.
If both the inputs of an AND gate are shorted together and tied to HIGH, the output of the gate is:
